reasoning: XLK (tech) -0.59% contrasts sharply with XLF (financials) +0.56%. Tech selling while financials bid creates a sector stalemate. The tech weakness is slightly larger in magnitude than financial support, suggesting a mild bearish lean, but the clear contradiction between the two largest SPY drivers (tech and finance) means internals are providing conflicting signals. Breadth is narrow: only 1 of 3 major sectors green. No clear risk-on or risk-off rotation. SPY's -0.12% reflects this internal tug-of-war. Cannot advocate a directional bias when sector leadership is this mixed.
key_observations: XLK: -0.59% — Tech selling, bearish signal (tech is ~30% SPY weighting)
XLF: +0.56% — Financials defending, mild bullish signal
XLE: +0.02% — Energy flat, no contribution to rotation story
Sector contradiction: XLK down + XLF up = conflicting leadership, net tug-of-war, no clear directional bias
